category_title: Low-achieving middle school students with behavioral challenges
minimal_context: The tutor is attempting to start the first teaching and learning session with the class in a U-shaped seating arrangement.
dialogue:
TUTOR: Welcome to our first session. Please sit at your places in the U-shaped arrangement so we can begin the lesson.

STUDENT: Did you read what's written on the door? Welcome to the hell.

TUTOR: Let's just focus on getting started with the learning session today.

STUDENT: (Refuses to sit at their place and starts loudly disturbing their friends) I'm not sitting there, I'm talking to them.

TUTOR: Please stop distracting the others and take your seat.

STUDENT: (Engages in a verbal argument) I don't have to listen to you! I come in and get out of class anytime I feel to do so! (Walks out of the classroom)

options.A: Implement classroom activities with less demanding rules during the teaching and learning sessions.
options.B: Pre-plan specific teacher responses to potential non-compliance during the teaching and learning sessions.
options.C: Maintain the U-shaped seating arrangement to promote two-way communication between the students and the teacher.
options.D: Transition the decision of when and for how long to take quiet time from the teacher to the student.
